original_statement: which stadium had the highest attendance?
mutated_statement: which venue had both the highest and the lowest attendance?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Information addition + Query complexity increase: "stadium" → "venue" (specific→general) | addition of "lowest" and conjunction "both ... and ..." (only highest → both highest and lowest) | single superlative query → conjunctive dual-superlative query ("which stadium had the highest attendance?" → "which venue had both the highest and the lowest attendance?")

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中“扫描attendance列显示最高为96,856在Neyland Stadium，最低为41,358在Scott Field，因此场地为Neyland Stadium和Scott Field”的陈述，agent识别并报告了最高和最低两项，但未提及原始变异问题中“both...and...”暗含的同一场地同时为最高和最低的不合理性。具体表现为：在执行链中直接按常规检索最高/最低值并返回两者，未质疑或澄清矛盾指令，也未尝试合理化或修正指令。因而归类为“无法意识到指令矛盾”，属于形式化执行而非语义澄清的案例。
